issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases, focusing only on the happy path.
The skill relies on PostgreSQL-specific features like RLS and gen_random_uuid(), limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: multi-tenant-project-management-schema
scenarios.rationale: Response A partially meets some schema aspects but fails on UUID v7, updated_at, correct RLS variable, and idempotent migration syntax; Response B provides no content.

scenarios.name: add-tenant-isolation-to-orders
scenarios.rationale: Response A correctly adds NOT NULL tenant_id columns, enables RLS with the required session variable, creates indexes, and is largely idempotent, whereas Response B uses the wrong session variable name and defaults, missing the exact rubric requirement.
